meta.title: 6billionforpeace — Time to unite 6 billion voices for peace
meta.description: A voluntary, independent global movement for world peace. Sign and add your voice to 6 billion others. No politics. No religion. No commerce. Only peace.

solution.title: The solution is peace
solution.p1: Throughout history, humanity has lived through conflicts believing that war could bring peace.
solution.p2: We are tired of the suffering and destruction caused by violence.
solution.p3: We no longer want to depend only on politicians, religions, companies, or institutions.
solution.p4: It is time to unite billions of people around one shared goal: peace in the world.

call.p1: Join the largest peace movement in human history.
call.p2: Peace will no longer be just a dream, a speech, a promise, or a distant hope.
call.p3: Peace is the survival of humanity.

principles.title: Our principles
principles.sovereignty: No interference in the internal laws or sovereignty of any nation.
principles.maturity: Humanity has matured enough to resolve conflicts without self-destruction. We know the horror of war. Now it is time to experience the joy of peace.

everest.body: At the top of Mount Everest, a white flag carrying the heart of peace will rise as a symbol of a humanity that chose to live in peace.

form.title: Sign for peace
form.subtitle: Add your voice. Free, anonymous to the public, secure.
form.name: Full name
form.consent: I agree with the collection of my data under the terms of the LGPD/GDPR privacy policy.
form.successBody: Your signature has been added. Share the movement.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.errorDuplicate: You have already signed this petition. Thank you so much for your participation!
form.errorCaptcha: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
form.shareBody: Help us reach more voices for peace.
form.shareText: I just signed for peace at 6billionforpeace.net — unite billions of voices for a single goal: peace in the world.
form.errorNoDigits: Please enter only your name (no ID numbers).
form.supportTreaty: I support a World Peace Treaty.
form.supportTreatyRequired: You must agree with the Peace Treaty to sign.
form.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts from this network. Please wait a few minutes.
form.errorTooFast: Please take a moment to fill out the form.
form.errorDisposable: Please use a permanent email address.

shareLink.title: Send to a friend
shareLink.body: Copy the link and share with anyone — every voice counts.

footer.mission: This is a free and independent project, with no distinctions or political, religious, commercial, or national affiliations. Its sole purpose is peace.

cookie.title: We respect your privacy
cookie.body: We use only the essential data needed to register your signature, in compliance with LGPD/GDPR. We do not use marketing trackers.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data we collect when you sign the petition and how we handle it. We follow LGPD (Brazil) and GDPR (EU) by design: we collect only what is essential, and we do not run marketing trackers.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: When you sign, we record your name, email, country, optional city, the language you signed in, and a timestamp. That is it.

sections.heading: Why we collect it
sections.body: Your data is used to count your voice, display it on the live counter and map, and prevent duplicate signatures. It is never used for marketing, profiling, or any commercial purpose.

sections.heading: IP addresses
sections.body: Your IP address is never stored. To prevent abuse we keep only a one-way SHA-256 hash combined with a secret salt — it cannot be reversed back to your IP.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use one cookie to remember the language you selected, and a Supabase session cookie only when an administrator logs in. There are no advertising or analytics trackers.

sections.heading: Third parties
sections.body: Hosting: Vercel. Database: Supabase, on our own server. Anti-bot: Cloudflare Turnstile. Map tiles: MapLibre. None of them receive your personal data beyond what is technically required to deliver the page.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your signature at any time by contacting us. Deletions are processed within 30 days.

sections.heading: Retention
sections.body: Signatures are kept for the duration of the movement. If the movement ends, the data is anonymised or deleted.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By signing, you join a global, voluntary movement for peace, with no political, religious, or commercial ties. These terms describe how to participate and what to expect.

sections.heading: Nature of the movement
sections.body: 6billionforpeace is a peaceful, independent civic initiative. Its only goal is to unite voices around a single message: peace in the world.

sections.heading: Who can sign
sections.body: Anyone may sign, regardless of nationality, faith, or background. We ask that the information you provide be accurate and that you sign only once per person.

sections.heading: Acceptable use
sections.body: Do not submit false data, hate speech, illegal content, or anything that promotes violence. We may remove signatures that violate these terms.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: The 6billionforpeace name, copy and visuals belong to the movement. The aggregated, anonymous signature count is public information and may be shared freely.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: We provide this site as-is, in good faith, with no warranties. We are not liable for actions taken by third parties based on the contents of this site.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
sections.body: We may update these terms as the movement grows. Material changes will be flagged on this page along with the updated date above.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.subtitle: How we keep this movement clean

pillars.title: No affiliation
pillars.body: No political, religious, or commercial ties. Just one shared message: peace in the world.

pillars.title: No trackers
pillars.body: No advertising or analytics scripts. We do not profile you. We do not sell data.

pillars.title: IP never stored
pillars.body: We only keep a one-way SHA-256 hash with a secret salt to prevent abuse. It cannot be reversed.

pillars.title: Independent infrastructure
pillars.body: Database on our own server. Map by MapLibre. Anti-bot by Cloudflare Turnstile. You can read the full policy below.

confirmed.title: Your voice is counted.
confirmed.body: Thank you for confirming. You are now part of the movement.
confirmed.invalidBody: We could not confirm your signature. The link may have already been used or has expired.

email.subject: Thank you for signing — 6billionforpeace
email.heading: Your voice is counted
email.body:
Thank you for signing for peace, {name}.

Your signature has been registered on 6billionforpeace.net. You are now part of a global, voluntary movement to unite billions of voices around a single goal: peace in the world.

Share the movement so more people can join.
email.footer: 6billionforpeace — A voluntary, independent movement for world peace.

comingSoon.label: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: This page is being prepared. Check back soon.

participation.title: Participation
participation.lead: How to join and amplify this movement.
participation.intro: To participate is to make a conscious choice:
participation.personal: Your participation is personal, meaningful, and global.
participation.notOrg: You are not joining an organization.
participation.formTitle: Make Your Voice Heard for Global Peace

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.lead: How we keep this initiative free, independent and trustworthy.

donations.title: Donations
donations.lead: How contributions are received and used.
donations.subtitle: Support the Peace Movement
donations.intro: To support the movement, send us an email and we will guide you through the contribution process.
donations.quote: This movement exists through people, not institutions, governments, companies, or politics.
donations.highlight: We are building a fully transparent donation system designed to allow real-time visibility of fund allocation and long-term traceability of contributions.
donations.future: Future initiatives supported by this movement include peace education, humanitarian aid, and global environmental projects.

peaceWall.title: Global Peace Mural
peaceWall.lead: A global mural of voices for peace.
peaceWall.subtitle: A collective space where humanity shares what becomes possible when peace is real.
peaceWall.voiceTitle: Your voice matters. If you wish, send a short message or photo about peace. We may feature it in the Global Peace Mural.

declaration.title: Global Civil Peace Declaration
declaration.subtitle: “6 Billion for Peace” is more than a symbolic movement.
paragraphs: We are a civic grassroots initiative dedicated to the recognition of peace, human dignity, freedom of conscience, and the protection of life as fundamental human rights.
The movement seeks to build an unprecedented civil declaration in history and present it to all international courts and the governments of the 195 countries of the world.
Our mission is to encourage legal, non-violent, and democratic pathways through which individuals may publicly and legally affirm their commitment to peace and to the protection of human life.

Following global mobilization, participants may receive support to voluntarily seek legal recognition as “Citizens of Peace” within their respective national legal systems, always with full respect for the laws and democratic processes of each country.

This initiative supports dialogue, diplomacy, human rights, and the peaceful evolution of the international community, especially in a time of growing global instability and increasing urgency for the human right to live in peace, with clarity of purpose.

Our intention is clear: to transform peace into a global civil voice — democratic, legal, and sustained by billions of human beings — with the shared goal of resolving conflicts without destroying human life, especially that of children, or the planet we inhabit.

We are here to strengthen humanity, protect future generations, and preserve life on Earth. Our actions are always ethical, transparent, focused on the common good, with no distinction between people, strengthening respect for humanity, international cooperation, and global responsibility among all nations.
Peace is our first and most important step forward. We will not wait any longer. We will build peace — now, together.
declaration.closing: After all, we are only human beings living on a small planet.

humansForPeace.title: Humans for peace
humansForPeace.body: One movement. One purpose. Billions of voices choosing peace together.

thankYou.title: Thank you. You are now part of peace itself.
